'''takafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iambic|iambic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iambic|iambic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| takafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækæfæth|tækæfæth]] || [[word:tækæfæj|tækæfæj]] || [[word:tækæfæsh|tækæfæsh]] || [[word:tækæfæ|tækæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:takakafath|takakafath]] || [[word:takakafaj|takakafaj]] || [[word:takakafash|takakafash]] || [[word:takakafa|takakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:takafath|takafath]] || [[word:takafaj|takafaj]] || [[word:takafash|takafash]] || [[word:takafa|takafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:takaffath|takaffath]] || [[word:takaffaj|takaffaj]] || [[word:takaffash|takaffash]] || [[word:takaffaf|takaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takafatha|takafatha]] || [[word:takafaja|takafaja]] || [[word:takafasha|takafasha]] || [[word:takafaka|takafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takafath|takafath]] || [[word:takafaj|takafaj]] || [[word:takafash|takafash]] || [[word:takafa|takafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takafathal|takafathal]] || [[word:takafajal|takafajal]] || [[word:takafashal|takafashal]] || [[word:takafakal|takafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takafathatha|takafathatha]] || [[word:takafajaja|takafajaja]] || [[word:takafashasha|takafashasha]] || [[word:takafaka|takafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takafathan|takafathan]] || [[word:takafajan|takafajan]] || [[word:takafashan|takafashan]] || [[word:takafakan|takafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takafathaoro|takafathaoro]] || [[word:takafajaoro|takafajaoro]] || [[word:takafashaoro|takafashaoro]] || [[word:takafakaoro|takafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
